{{short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Lesotho women's national football team}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name              = Lesotho
| Badge             = Flag of Lesotho.svg
| Nickname          = {{lang|st|Likuena}} (Crocodiles)
| Association       = [[Lesotho Football Association]] (LeFA)
| Confederation     = [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]] (Africa)
| Sub-confederation = [[Council of Southern Africa Football Associations|COSAFA]] (Southern Africa)
| Coach             = Bob Atang Mafoso 
| Captain           = [[Sekhoane Moerane]]
| Most caps         = [[Jane Thabantso]] (101)
| Top scorer        = Jane Thabantso (15)
| Home Stadium      = [[Setsoto Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme    = LES
| FIFA Rank         = {{FIFA World Rankings|LES}}
| FIFA max          = 105
| FIFA max date     = August 2014
| FIFA min          = 185
| FIFA min date     = August 2011
| Elo Rank          = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Lesotho}}
| Elo max           = 122
| Elo max date      = June 1979
| Elo min           = 179
| Elo min date      = June 2016
| pattern_la1           =_lesotho1920h 
| pattern_b1            =_lesotho1920h
| pattern_ra1           =_lesotho1920h
| pattern_sh1           =_lesotho1920h
| pattern_so1           =_lesotho1920h
| leftarm1              = 177d36
| body1                 =
| rightarm1             = 177d36
| shorts1               = 177d36
| socks1                = FFFFFF
| pattern_la2           =_lesotho1920a 
| pattern_b2            =_lesotho1920a
| pattern_ra2           =_lesotho1920a 
| pattern_sh2           =_lesotho1920a
| pattern_so2           =_lesotho1920a
| leftarm2              = 
| body2                 = 
| rightarm2             = 
| shorts2               =008c54 
| socks2                = 008c54
| pattern_la3           =_lesotho1920a
| pattern_b3            =_lesotho1920t
| pattern_ra3           =_lesotho1920a
| pattern_sh3           =_lesotho1920t
| socks3                =0000FF
| First game            = {{fb|LES|1966}} 2–1 {{fb-rt|MAW}} <br> ([[Malawi]]; 8 August 1970)
| Largest win           = {{fb|LES|1987}} 5–0 {{fb-rt|SWZ|name=Swaziland}} <br> ([[Maseru]], [[Lesotho]]; 14 April 2006)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|ZAM|1964}} 9–0 {{fb-rt|LES|1987}} <br> ([[Botswana]]; 8 August 1988)
| World cup apps        = 
| World cup first       = 
| World cup best        = 
| Regional name         = 
| Regional cup apps     = 
| Regional cup first    = 
| Regional cup best     = 
| 2ndRegional name      = 
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 
| 2ndRegional cup first = 
| 2ndRegional cup best  = 
| 3rdRegional name      = [[COSAFA Cup]]
| 3rdRegional cup apps  = 22
| 3rdRegional cup first = [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]
| 3rdRegional cup best  = Runners-up ([[2000 COSAFA Cup|2000]], [[2023 COSAFA Cup|2023]])
| medaltemplates        = 
{{MedalCompetition|[[COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2000 COSAFA Cup|2000 Southern Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2023 COSAFA Cup|2023 South Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalBronze|[[2018 COSAFA Cup|2018 South Africa]]|Team}}
}}

The '''Lesotho national football team''', also known as '''LNFT''', represents [[Lesotho]] in men's international [[association football]] and is governed by the [[Lesotho Football Association]].

==History==

Following Lesotho's independence from the [[United Kingdom]] in 1966, the [[Lesotho Football Association]] was created, and later, the Lesotho national football team, which played its first match on 7 August 1970 against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]], where Lesotho won 2-1.

Lesotho participated in its first World Cup qualifiers, for the [[1974 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|1974 tournament]], drawing 0–0 against [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]] at home before losing 1–6 in the second leg and getting eliminated. Lesotho was also eliminated in the [[1974 African Cup of Nations qualification|first round]] of qualifying for the [[1974 African Cup of Nations|1974 AFCON]], losing 1–5 to [[Mauritius national football team|Mauritius]] after a 0–0 draw in the first leg. Lesotho faced [[Mauritius national football team|Mauritius]] again in their next attempt to [[1980 African Cup of Nations qualification|qualify for 1980 AFCON]], losing on [[Away goals rule|away goals]]. In [[1982 African Cup of Nations qualification|qualifying for the 1982 tournament]], Lesotho lost 3–7 on aggregate to [[Mozambique national football team|Mozambique]]. Lesotho then faced [[Guinea national football team|Guinea]] in the [[1982 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|1982 World Cup first qualification round]], losing 4–2 on aggregate.

Lesotho won their first ever qualification tie during the [[1994 African Cup of Nations qualification|1994 AFCON qualifiers]], beating [[Botswana national football team|Botswana]] 4–0 on aggregate, with all four goals coming in the second leg in Botswana. With this victory they entered the group stage of qualifying, managing to draw against [[Kenya national football team|Kenya]] (2–2), [[DR Congo national football team|Zaire]] (1–1), and [[Mozambique national football team|Mozambique]] (1–1) at home, but losing all three away fixtures to finish bottom of the group.

Lesotho withdrew from the [[1996 African Cup of Nations qualification|1996 AFCON qualification]] and was subsequently banned from the next tournament therefore next entered the [[2000 African Cup of Nations qualification|2000 AFCON qualifiers]], losing in the first round to [[Mauritius national football team|Mauritius]]. Lesotho qualified for the [[1999 COSAFA Cup]] after beating [[Namibia national football team|Namibia]] 1–0, but lost to eventual winners [[Angola national football team|Angola]] 0–1 in the quarter-finals. The following year Lesotho produced their best ever finish at the [[2000 COSAFA Cup]], only qualifying for the tournament via disciplinary record. They beat [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]] 3–1 on penalties before scoring two late goals against [[Angola national football team|Angola]] in the semi-finals to win 2–1. In the final they lost 3–0 twice across two legs to [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] to finish as runners-up.

==Results and fixtures==
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025 COSAFA Cup]]
|date       = 5 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|+2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|MWI}}
|score      = 0–1
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = [[Makara Ntaitsane|Ntaitsane]] {{Goal|87}}
|stadium    = [[Free State Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|attendance = 
|referee    = Patrice Milazar ([[Mauritius Football Association|Mauritius]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-06-05/malawi-vs-lesotho/3719202/
|result     = W
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 COSAFA Cup]]
|date       = 8 June
|time       = {{UTZ|12:00|+2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|ANG}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|goals1     =
*[[Vidinho]] {{Goal|42}}
*[[Depú]] {{Goal|44||52||90+4}}
|goals2     =
|stadium    = [[Dr. Petrus Molemela Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|attendance =
|referee    = [[Akhona Makalima]] ([[South African Football Association|South Africa]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-06-08/angola-vs-lesotho/3719208/
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = 10 June
| time       = {{UTZ|15:00|+2}}
| round      = [[2025 COSAFA Cup]] 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
|score      = 3–0
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|goals1     =
*[[Sisqo Haraseb|Haraseb]] {{Goal|7}}
*[[Bethuel Muzeu|Muzeu]] {{Goal|74}}
*[[Joslin Kamatuka|Kamatuka]] {{Goal|82|pen.}}
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Dr. Petrus Molemela Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|attendance =
|referee    = Thabang Ketshabile ([[Botswana Football Association|Botswana]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-06-10/namibia-vs-lesotho/3719212/
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = September 
| time       = 
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}} 
| team2      = {{fb|RSA}} 
| score      = 0–3
| report     = 
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
| stadium    = 
| location   = 
| attendance =
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = September 
| time       = 
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|BEN}} 
| team2      = {{fb|LES}} 
| score      = 4–0
| report     = 
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
| stadium    = 
| location   = 
| attendance =
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = October
| time       = 
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}} 
| team2      = {{fb|NGA}} 
| score      = 1–2
| report     = 
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
| stadium    = 
| location   = 
| attendance =
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = October
| time       = 
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}} 
| team2      = {{fb|ZIM}} 
| score      = 1–0
| report     = 
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
| stadium    = 
| location   = 
| attendance =
| result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = 15 November
| time       = {{UTZ|16:00|2}}
| round      = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MWI}} 
| team2      = {{fb|LES}} 
| score      = 0–0
| report     = https://nyasabigbullets.com/bullets-trio-in-action-as-flames-draw-with-lesotho/
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
| stadium    = [[Free State Stadium|Toyota Stadium]]
| location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
| attendance =
| result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| date       = 18 November
| time       = {{UTZ|16:00|2}}
| round      = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]] 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MWI}} 
| team2      = {{fb|LES}} 
| score      = 1–0
| report     = https://www.panafricafootball.com/post/friendly-malawi-v-lesotho/
| goals1     = *[[Mayele Malango|Malango]] {{goal|25}}
| goals2     =
| stadium    = [[Free State Stadium|Toyota Stadium]]
| location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
| attendance =
| result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SEY}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|stadium    = [[Free State Stadium|Toyota Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = [[William Oloya]] ([[Federation of Uganda Football Associations|Uganda]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-26/seychelles-vs-lesotho/4048697
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 2–1
|team2      = {{fb|SEY}}
|goals1       =
*[[Lebohang Lesako|Lesako]] {{goal|50}}
*[[Sera Motebang|Motebang]] {{goal|82}}
|goals2       =
*[[Brandon Labrosse|Labrosse]] {{goal|45+2}}
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|stadium    = [[Free State Stadium|Toyota Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = Gerson Esono ([[Equatoguinean Football Federation|Equatorial Guinea]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-29/lesotho-vs-seychelles/4048698
|result     = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition match#International football|Friendly]]
|date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|KEN}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Thabo Makhele|Makhele]] {{goal|70}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Frank Odhiambo|F. Odhiambo]] {{goal|12}}
|stadium    = [[Lucas Moripe Stadium]]
|location   = [[Pretoria]], South Africa
|attendance = 
|referee    = Jelly Chavani ([[South African Football Association|South Africa]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-06-04/lesotho-vs-kenya/4306219
|result     = D
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition match#International football|Friendly]]
|date       = 7 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 0–4
|team2      = {{fb|KEN}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
*[[Mohammed Bajaber|Bajaber]] {{goal|8||52}}
*[[Lawrence Ouma|Ouma]] {{goal|84||88}}
|stadium    = [[Lucas Moripe Stadium]]
|location   = [[Pretoria]], South Africa
|attendance = 
|referee    = Jelly Chavani ([[South African Football Association|South Africa]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-06-07/lesotho-vs-kenya/4306218
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GAB}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Gabon
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|GAB}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Lesotho
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|NIG}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Lesotho
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|NIG}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Niger
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|MAR}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|LES}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Morocco
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON Qualifiers]]
|date       = TBD
|time       = TBD
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LES}}
|score      = 
|team2      = {{fb|MAR}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = TBD, Lesotho
|stadium    = TBD
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     =
}}

==Managers==

[[File:Pak Coaching Staff.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Zaviša Milosavljević]], here in the middle of the Pakistan national football team staff, became the manager of Lesotho in 2007]]

:Caretaker manager are listed in ''italics''.
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
* {{flagicon|RSA|1928}} [[April Phumo]] (1979–1995)
* {{flagicon|LES|1987}} [[Lefa Ramakau]] (2000–??)
* {{flagicon|LES|1987}} [[Monaheng Monyane]] (2003–2004)
* {{flagicon|GER}} [[Antoine Hey]] (2004–2006)
* {{flagicon|LES}} [[Motheo Mohapi]] (2006–2007)
* {{flagicon|SRB|2004}} [[Zaviša Milosavljević]] (2007–2009)
* {{flagicon|LES}} ''[[Leslie Notši]]'' (2009)
* {{flagicon|LES}} [[Leslie Notši]] (2011–2013)
* {{flagicon|LES}} ''[[Adam Siddorn]]'' (2013)
* {{flagicon|LES}} [[Mochini Matete|Seephephe Matete]] (2014–2015)
* {{flagicon|RSA}} [[Moses Maliehe]] (2015–2019)
* {{flagicon|LES}} [[Mpitsa Marai]] (2019)
* {{flagicon|RSA}} [[Thabo Senong]] (2019–2021)
* {{flagicon|LES}} ''[[Leslie Notši]]'' (2021–2022)
* {{flagicon|SRB}} [[Veselin Jelušić]] (2022–2023)
* {{flagicon|LES}} [[Leslie Notši]] (2023–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were selected for the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group C]] matches against [[South Africa national football team|South Africa]] and [[Rwanda national football team|Rwanda]] on 21 and 25 March 2025.<ref>{{cite web |title=South Africa-Lesotho |url=https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288282/288289/400019682 |publisher=FIFA |access-date=27 March 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Rwanda-Lesotho |url=https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288282/288289/400019683 |publisher=FIFA |access-date=27 March 2025}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 25 March 2025, after the match against [[Rwanda national football team|Rwanda]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Sekhoane Moerane]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|9|18|df=y}}|caps=48|goals=1|club=[[Orbit College F.C.|Orbit College]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Tankiso Chaba]]|age={{birth date and age|1995|12|27|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Correctional Services FC|Lesotho Correctional Services]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Nthebe Majoro]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|07|21|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Mounted Police Service FC|Police Service]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rethabile Rasethuntsa]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|11|22|df=y}}|caps=45|goals=1|club=[[Linare FC|Linare]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Motlomelo Mkhwanazi]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|11|5|df=y}}|caps=40|goals=1|club=[[Kruger United F.C.|Kruger United]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thabang Malane]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|6|10|df=y}}|caps=40|goals=0|club=[[African All Stars F.C.|African All Stars]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rethabile Mokokoane]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|4|6|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=1|club=[[Matlama FC|Matlama]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thabo Makhele]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|12|17|df=y}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[Chippa United F.C.|Chippa United]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Lehlohonolo Matsau]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|3|6|df=y}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Defence Force FC|Lesotho Defence Force]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thato Sefoli]]|age={{birth date and age|1995|5|22|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Upington City F.C.|Upington City]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Fusi Matlabe]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|5|23|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Mpheni Home Defenders FC|Mpheni Home Defenders]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tsepo Toloane]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|7|15|df=y}}|caps=57|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Defence Force FC|Lesotho Defence Force]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lisema Lebokollane]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|2|25|df=y}}|caps=54|goals=0|club=[[Matlama FC|Matlama]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lehlohonolo Fothoane]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|2|23|df=y}}|caps=42|goals=3|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tshwarelo Bereng]]|age={{birth date and age|1990|10|30|df=y}}|caps=42|goals=2|club=[[Orbit College F.C.|Orbit College]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Thabo Matšoele]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|5|23|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=0|club=[[Linare FC|Linare]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mokoteli Mohapi]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|01|24|df=yes}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lioli FC|Lioli]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Hlompho Kalake]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|9|2|df=y}}|caps=60|goals=9|club=[[Bantu FC|Bantu]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Neo Mokhachane]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|9|22|df=y}}|caps=26|goals=4|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Katleho Makateng]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|9|20|df=y}}|caps=27|goals=3|club=[[Lesotho Defence Force FC|Lesotho Defence Force]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Lemohang Lintša]]|age={{birth date and age|1992|4|3|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Limkokwing University FC|Limkokwing University]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Mohlomi Makhetha]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|9|21|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Correctional Services FC|Lesotho Correctional Services]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Keketso Snyder]]|age={{birth date and age|1990|10|16|df=yes}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Correctional Services FC|Lesotho Correctional Services]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs end}}

<!---
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Ntsane Molise]]|age={{bda|1994|7|30|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Linare FC|Linare]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thabo Mafatle]]|age={{bda|1996|9|18|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[Bantu FC|Bantu]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mpho Hlephole]]|age={{bda|1994|6|9|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lioli FC|Lioli]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Teboho Letsema]]|age={{Bda|2002|9|9|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Linare FC|Linare]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tlotliso Phatsisi]]|age={{Bda|1999|5|26|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Black Leopards F.C.|Black Leopards]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Paseka Maile]]|age={{Bda|2005|8|30|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Kick4Life F.C.|Kick4Life]]|clubnat=LES}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Sera Motebang]]|age={{bda|1995|5|1|df=y}}|caps=71|goals=12|club=[[Royal AM F.C.|Royal AM]]|clubnat=RSA}}
--->

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up to the Lesotho squad within the last twelve months.

{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Seahlolo Mosoeu]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|5|3|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lesotho Correctional Services FC|Lesotho Correctional Services]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|ETH}}; 24 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Monaheng Ramalefane]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|12|22|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Matlama FC|Matlama]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Motete John Mohai]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|5|1|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Matlama FC|Matlama]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|RWA}}; 11 June 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kopano Tšeka]]|age={{birth date and age|1991|11|8|df=y}}|caps=50|goals=1|club=[[Lioli FC|Lioli]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|NAM}}; 1 June 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Bokang Sello]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|8|8|df=y}}|caps=32|goals=0|club=[[Botswana Police XI SC|Police]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rethabile Senkoto]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|1|16|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Lifofane F.C.|Lifofane]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tumelo Khutlang]]|age={{Birth date and age|1995|10|23|df=y}}|caps=47|goals=3|club=[[Lioli FC|Lioli]]|clubnat=LES|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tsepang Sefali]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|7|7|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=0|club=[[Bantu FC|Bantu]]|clubnat=LES|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]<sup>INJ</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Thabo Lesaoana]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|11|7|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=0|club=[[Bantu FC|Bantu]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|RWA}}; 11 June 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Alfred Mosoeu]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|5|21|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Mangaung Unite FC|Mangaung Unite]]|clubnat=RSA|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tumelo Shai]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|5|10|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Kaizer Chiefs F.C.|Kaizer Chiefs]]|clubnat=RSA|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jane Thabantso]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|1|22|df=y}}|caps=92|goals=15|club=[[Matlama FC|Matlama]]|clubnat=LES|latest=v. {{fb|GAB}}; 15 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Thabiso Brown]]|age={{birth date and age|1995|10|3|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=1|club=[[Jiangxi Lushan F.C.|Jiangxi Lushan]]|clubnat=CHN|latest=v. {{fb|RSA}}; 11 January 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
<sup>INJ</sup> Withdrew due to injury<br/>
<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad / standby<br/>
<sup>RET</sup> Retired from the national team<br/>
<sup>SUS</sup> Serving suspension<br/>
<sup>WD</sup> Player withdrew from the squad due to non-injury issue.
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|18 November 2025}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Lesotho |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/104/Lesotho.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=2022-07-06 |archive-date=2023-07-24 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230724175716/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/104/2023/Lesotho.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Lesotho.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|align="left"|'''[[Jane Thabantso]]'''
|99
|15
|2014–present
|-
|2
|align="left"|'''[[Sera Motebang]]'''
|76
|12
|2016–present
|-
|3
|align="left"|[[Basia Makepe]]
|69
|1
|2012–2023
|-
|4
|align="left"|[[Nkau Lerotholi]]
|68
|2
|2008–2021
|-
|5
|align="left"|'''[[Tšepo Toloane]]'''
|65
|0
|2018–present
|-
|6
|align="left"|'''[[Hlompho Kalake]]'''
|63
|11
|2015–present
|-
|7
|align="left"|'''[[Lisema Lebokollane]]'''
|56
|0
|2019–present
|-
|8
|align="left"|'''[[Sekhoane Moerane]]'''
|55
|1
|2019–present
|-
|9
|align="left"|[[Tšoanelo Koetle]]
|54
|2
|2011–2021
|-
|10
|align="left"|[[Bushi Moletsane]]
|53
|3
|2004–2015
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Jane Thabantso]]'''
|15
|99
|{{#expr:15/99 round 2}}
|2014–present
|-
|2
|align="left"|'''[[Sera Motebang]]'''
|12
|76
|{{#expr:12/76 round 2}}
|2016–present
|-
|3
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Hlompho Kalake]]'''
|11
|63
|{{#expr:11/63 round 2}}
|2015–present
|-
|4
|align="left"|[[Refiloe Potse]]
|9
|23
|{{#expr:9/23 round 2}}
|1998–2009
|-
|5
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Tsepo Seturumane]]
|8
|38
|{{#expr:8/38 round 2}}
|2013–2020
|-
|6
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Thapelo Tale]]
|7
|45
|{{#expr:7/45 round 2}}
|2008–2019
|-
|rowspan=3|7
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Teele Ntšonyana]]
|5
|19
|{{#expr:5/19 round 2}}
|1995–2004
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Majara Masupha]]
|5
|20
|{{#expr:5/20 round 2}}
|1998–2004
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Motlatsi Shale]]
|5
|22
|{{#expr:5/22 round 2}}
|1998–2006
|-
|rowspan=7|10
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Thulo Ranchobe]]
|4
|23
|{{#expr:4/23 round 2}}
|2003–2013
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Sello Muso]]
|4
|29
|{{#expr:4/29 round 2}}
|2006–2009
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Neo Mokhachane]]'''
|4
|30
|{{#expr:4/30 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Lehlohonolo Seema]]
|4
|35
|{{#expr:4/35 round 2}}
|1998–2008
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Ralekoti Mokhahlane]]
|4
|38
|{{#expr:4/38 round 2}}
|2006–2018
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Bokang Mothoana]]
|4
|39
|{{#expr:4/39 round 2}}
|2005–2017
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Lehlohonolo Fothoane]]'''
|4
|47
|{{#expr:4/47 round 2}}
|2017–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan="30"|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1962 FIFA World Cup|1962]]
|colspan=8|''Part of {{flagicon|UK}} [[United Kingdom]]''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flagicon|UK}} [[United Kingdom]]''
|-
|[[1966 FIFA World Cup|1966]] and [[1970 FIFA World Cup|1970]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|West Germany}} [[1974 FIFA World Cup|1974]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|Argentina}} [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|2
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} [[1986 FIFA World Cup|1986]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
|-
|[[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]] and [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|6
|0
|0
|6
|2
|16
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|8
|2
|3
|3
|7
|17
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|2
|0
|2
|0
|1
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|2
|0
|2
|0
|1
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|10
|3
|3
|4
|9
|12
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|- 
!Total 
!
!{{Tooltip|0/15|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!
!
!
!
!
!
!36
!5
!13 
!18 
!24
!64 
|}

===Africa Cup of Nations===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Africa Cup of Nations]] record
! rowspan="41" |
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan|1956}} [[1957 African Cup of Nations|1957]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Part of {{UK}}''
|colspan=6 rowspan=4|''Part of {{UK}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|United Arab Republic}} [[1959 African Cup of Nations|1959]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1897}} [[1962 Africa Cup of Nations|1962]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[1963 Africa Cup of Nations|1963]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia|1959}} [[1965 Africa Cup of Nations|1965]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=4|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1897}} [[1968 Africa Cup of Nations|1968]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan|1956}} [[1970 Africa Cup of Nations|1970]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Cameroon|1961}} [[1972 Africa Cup of Nations|1972]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt|1972}} [[1974 African Cup of Nations|1974]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||1||1||1||5
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1975}} [[1976 African Cup of Nations|1976]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[1978 African Cup of Nations|1978]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Nigeria}} [[1980 African Cup of Nations|1980]] || rowspan=2 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||1||0||1||2||2
|-
|{{flagicon|Libya|1977}} [[1982 African Cup of Nations|1982]]
|2||1||0||1||3||7
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}} [[1984 African Cup of Nations|1984]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[1986 African Cup of Nations|1986]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[1988 African Cup of Nations|1988]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Algeria}} [[1990 African Cup of Nations|1990]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Senegal}} [[1992 African Cup of Nations|1992]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia|1959}} [[1994 African Cup of Nations|1994]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|8||1||4||3||8||17
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[1996 African Cup of Nations|1996]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew during qualifying''
|6||1||0||5||3||16
|-
|{{flagicon|Burkina Faso}} [[1998 African Cup of Nations|1998]]
|colspan=8|''Banned''
|colspan=6|''Banned for withdrawing in 1996''
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} {{flagicon|Nigeria}} [[2000 African Cup of Nations|2000]] 
|rowspan=6 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||1||1||2||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Mali}} [[2002 Africa Cup of Nations|2002]]
|7
|2
|3
|3
|8
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia}} [[2004 Africa Cup of Nations|2004]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|1
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[2006 Africa Cup of Nations|2006]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations|2008]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|3
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|Angola}} [[2010 Africa Cup of Nations|2010]]
|6
|0
|0
|6
|2
|16
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}} {{flagicon|Gabon}} [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2013 Africa Cup of Nations|2013]]
|rowspan=7 colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|0
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}} [[2015 Africa Cup of Nations|2015]]
|10
|2
|3
|5
|6
|13
|-
|{{flagicon|Gabon}} [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations|2017]]
|6
|1
|0
|5
|5
|16
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations|2019]]
|6
|1
|3
|2
|3
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Cameroon}} [[2021 Africa Cup of Nations|2021]]
|6
|0
|3
|3
|3
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}} [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations|2023]]
|8
|1
|2
|5
|4
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|2
|13
|-
|{{flagicon|Kenya}} {{flagicon|Tanzania}} {{flagicon|Uganda}} [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations|2027]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
| colspan="6" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|}} [[2029 Africa Cup of Nations|2029]]
|-
!Total
!
!0/35
!
!
!
!
!
!
!91
!14
!24
!53
!57
!169
|}

===COSAFA Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!rowspan="2"|Year
!colspan="8"|[[COSAFA Cup]] record
|-
!Round||Result||Pld||W||D||L||GF||GA
|-
| [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]||rowspan=2|Preliminary round||7th||1||0||0||1||0||2
|-
| [[1998 COSAFA Cup|1998]]||10th||1||0||0||1||0||2
|-
| [[1999 COSAFA Cup|1999]]||Quarter-finals||8th||2||1||0||1||1||1
|-style="background:silver;"
| [[2000 COSAFA Cup|2000]]||'''Runners-up'''||2nd||5||1||1||3||3||9
|-
| [[2001 COSAFA Cup|2001]]||Quarter-finals||7th||1||0||0||1||1||2
|-
| [[2002 COSAFA Cup|2002]]||rowspan=6|First round||12th||1||0||0||1||0||2
|-
| [[2003 COSAFA Cup|2003]]||9th||1||0||1||0||0||0
|-
| [[2004 COSAFA Cup|2004]]||9th||1||0||1||0||0||0
|-
| [[2005 COSAFA Cup|2005]]||8th||1||0||0||1||1||2
|-
| [[2006 COSAFA Cup|2006]]||7th||2||0||1||1||1||3
|-
| [[2007 COSAFA Cup|2007]]||11th||2||0||0||2||2||5
|- 
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2008 COSAFA Cup|2008]]||Preliminary round||12th||3||1||1||1||2||2
|-
| {{flagicon|ZIM}} [[2009 COSAFA Cup|2009]]||Group stage||10th||2||1||1||0||3||2
|-style="background:LemonChiffon;"
| {{flagicon|ZAM}} [[2013 COSAFA Cup|2013]]||Fourth place||4th||6||1||3||2||10||10
|-
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2015 COSAFA Cup|2015]]||Group stage||11th||3||1||0||2||2||4
|-
| {{flagicon|NAM}} [[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016]]||Quarter-finals||7th||5||3||1||1||9||4
|-style="background:LemonChiffon;"
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2017 COSAFA Cup|2017]]||Fourth place||4th||3||0||2||1||3||4
|-bgcolor=cc9966
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2018 COSAFA Cup|2018]]||Third place||3rd||3||2||1||0||2||0
|-style="background:LemonChiffon;"
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2019 COSAFA Cup|2019]]||Fourth place||4th||3||0||2||1||3||4
|-
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2021 COSAFA Cup|2021]]||Group stage||8th||4||1||0|||3||3||12
|-
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2022 COSAFA Cup|2022]]||Group stage||10th||3||2||0||1||4||4
|-style="background:silver;"
| {{flagicon|RSA}} [[2023 COSAFA Cup|2023]]||'''Runners-up'''||2nd||5||2||1||2||6||6
|-
!Total
!Runners-up
!22/22
! 58 !! 16 !! 16 !! 26 !! 56 !! 80
|}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 7 June 2026 after match against [[Kenya national football team|Kenya]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Lesotho.htm|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Lesotho|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=28 June 2017|archive-date=20 January 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180120183048/http://www.eloratings.net/Lesotho.htm|url-status=live}}</ref>

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center"
|-
!width=220|Opponent<br />
!width=100|Pld<br />
!width=70|W<br />
!width=70|D<br />
!width=70|L<br />
!width=100|GF<br />
!width=100|GA<br />
!width=120|GD<br />
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ALG}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 9 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ANG}} || 11 || 1 || 1 || 9 || 7 || 27 || −20
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BEN}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 4 || –4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BOT}} || 31 || 5 || 11 || 15 || 23 || 39 || −16
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BFA}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 3 || −3
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BDI}} || 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 2 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CMR}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 4 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CPV}} || 2 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CTA}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 3 || –1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COM}} || 7 || 2 || 2 || 3 || 3 || 6 || –3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COD}} || 7 || 0 || 4 || 3 || 4 || 17 || −13
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ETH}} || 9 || 2 || 4 || 3 || 10 || 11 || –1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GAB}} || 6 || 0 || 2 || 4 || 3 || 12 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GAM}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 6 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GHA}} || 7 || 0 || 1 || 6 || 7 || 23 || −16
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUI}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 2 || 4 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CIV}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 1 || –1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|KEN}} || 10 || 1 || 5 || 4 || 7 || 15 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LAO}} || 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 1 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBR}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 1 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBY}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 5 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAD}} || 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 4 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAW}} || 25 || 5 || 6 || 14 || 17 || 47 || −30
|- 
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAS}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 5 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MRI}} || 16 || 8 || 3 || 5 || 27 || 23 || +4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAR}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 8 || −8
|- 
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MOZ}} || 24 || 4 || 7 || 13 || 10 || 33 || −23
|- 
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MYA}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NAM}} || 15 || 4 || 5 || 6 || 14 || 18 || –4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NIG}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 3 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NGA}} || 6 || 0 || 1 || 5 || 4 || 13 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RWA}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 2 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|STP}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEN}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 4 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEY}} || 8 || 4 || 3 || 1 || 10 || 7 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SLE}} || 2 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RSA}} || 17 || 2 || 5 || 10 || 10 || 31 || −21
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SUD}} || 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 1 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SWZ}} || 43 || 12 || 14 || 17 || 42 || 51 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TAN}} || 5 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 4 || 5 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TOG}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|UGA}} || 5 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 0 || 8 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZAM}} || 18 || 1 || 6 || 11 || 10 || 43 || −33
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZIM}} || 26 || 4 || 7 || 15 || 26 || 54 || −28
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total || 341 || 66 || 102 || 173 || 267 || 559 || −292
|}

==Honours==
===Regional===
* '''[[COSAFA Cup]]'''
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (2): [[2000 COSAFA Cup|2000]], [[2023 COSAFA Cup|2023]]
** {{Bronze3}} Third place (1): [[2018 COSAFA Cup|2018]]

==Kit suppliers==
* {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Uhlsport]] (2000)
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Umbro]] (2002, 2006)
* {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Uhlsport]] (2007)
* {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Adidas]] (2008–2011)
* {{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[Basutoland Ink]] (2012–2019)
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Umbro]] (2019–)

==Notes==
{{notelist}}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
{{commons category}}
* [https://www.cafonline.com/member-associations/les/ Lesotho] at [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/LES Lesotho] at [[FIFA]]

{{Football in Lesotho}}
{{CAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Lesotho}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Lesotho National Football Team}}
[[Category:Lesotho national football team| ]]
[[Category:African national association football teams]]
